nasb.text: Therefore the abundance which they have acquired and stored up They carry off over the brook of Arabim.

esv.text: Therefore the abundance they have gained and what they have laid up they carry away over the Brook of the Willows.

cnv.text: 所以，他們把所得的和所積蓄的財富， 都帶過了柳樹溪。

ccb.text: 因此，摩押人把自己积存的财物都运过柳树河。

csbs.text: 因此，他们把所赚得的和所积蓄的财富， 都运过柳树溪。
